switch.title: 一键/定时自动清理时运行文件归类
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_file_all=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已开启！" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_file_all=1/clearbox_auto_file_all=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已关闭！" fi

switch.title: 一键/定时自动清理时快速磁盘优化
switch.get: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then echo 1 else echo 0 fi
switch.set: if grep "clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0" "$work_dir/settings.prop" >/dev/null; then sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已开启！" else sed -i 's/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=1/clearbox_auto_fast_gc=0/g' "$work_dir/settings.prop" echo " » 已关闭！" fi

summary.sh: echo -n '当前设置大小：'; echo -n $(cat $work_dir/settings.prop | grep clearbox_clear_cache_size | cut -f2 -d '='); echo -n ' M'

param.name: put
param.desc: 请输入新值[数字]：(单位：兆（M）. 范围：100M)
param.label: 数字
